svg.aria-label: C4 Level 3 Backend Component diagram: the FastAPI backend is organized in six layers from entry points through API routers, services, utilities, infrastructure, down to data stores

g.text: ↳ each layer depends only on the one below it · CLI path is blue (offline) · API path is grey (online)
↳ polars.py highlighted: the Polars/PyArrow layer is the performance-critical path for both aggregation and footprint computation
data_router → ohlc.py → files.py → file_index.csv → polars.py (read + aggregate) → Parquet Data Lake → JSON
if footprints=true: ohlc.py → polars.py::trades_to_footprint → raw trade Parquet → bid/ask arrays → JSON
